title: barista pull — structured output
description: Top-level document emitted by `barista pull --output json`. Reports the outcome of dependency resolution, lockfile reconciliation, and artifact fetching for a project. All keys are kebab-case; the `command` field is a constant string discriminator that disambiguates this document from other Barista output documents.

command.description: Discriminator. Always the literal string `pull` for documents produced by `barista pull`.

project-root.description: Absolute path to the project root that was operated on (the directory holding `pom.xml`, or the wrapper-resolved root).

lockfile-status.description: Outcome of lockfile reconciliation: `absent` (no lockfile existed; expected under v0.1 `--no-fetch` on a fresh project), `unchanged` (lockfile matched the resolution), `written` (lockfile was rewritten on disk), `would-write` (a write was suppressed by `--check`/`--dry-run`), or `stale` (lockfile diverged from the project under strict mode and the command failed).

entries.description: Total number of resolved coords in the lockfile after this run.

fetched.description: Count of artifacts that were downloaded over the network during this run. Artifacts served from the local cache do not count.

no-fetch.description: Whether the command ran with `--no-fetch` (resolution-only, no network).

strict.description: Whether strict mode was active. In strict mode a stale lockfile is an error rather than a regeneration trigger.

project-signature.description: Optional truncated project signature (e.g. lockfile hash) that lets downstream tooling tie this run to a specific lockfile generation.

coords.description: Optional human-readable Maven coordinate of the project being pulled. Echoed by renderers; absent under `--quiet`.

warnings.description: Optional list of non-fatal warnings emitted during the run.
